parameters: ignoreErrors: - message: '#^Parameter \#1 of callable callable\(Pest\\Expectation\<string\|null\>\)\: Pest\\Arch\\Contracts\\ArchExpectation expects Pest\\Expectation\<string\|null\>, Pest\\Expectation\<string\|null\> given\.$#' identifier: argument.type count: 1 path: src/ArchPresets/AbstractPreset.php - message: '#^Method Pest\\Expectation\:\:and\(\) should return Pest\\Expectation\<TAndValue\> but returns \(Pest\\Expectation&TAndValue\)\|Pest\\Expectation\<TAndValue of mixed\>\.$#' identifier: return.type count: 1 path: src/Expectation.php - message: '#^PHPDoc tag @property for property Pest\\Expectation\:\:\$each contains generic class Pest\\Expectations\\EachExpectation but does not specify its types\: TValue$#' identifier: missingType.generics count: 1 path: src/Expectation.php -
